fullArticle:
We’re just two months away from Apple announcing the iPhone 18 Pro. Rumors suggest Apple could have three design changes in store that could be unpopular among some iPhone 18 Pro buyers …

The iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are expected to be thicker than their predecessors, but the exact specifics here are somewhat unclear.

According to Weibo leaker Fixed Focus Digital, the iPhone 18 Pro lineup could be around 2mm thicker than the iPhone 17 Pro. For context, the iPhone 17 Pro and iPhone 17 Pro are both 8.75mm thick. If this rumor pans out, the iPhone 18 Pro phones would be roughly 10.75mm thick.

Leaker Ice Universe, meanwhile, reported this week that the iPhone 18 Pro Max will measure around 9mm thick.
